Fault Uh-oh! Looks like you have stumbled upon some top-secret records.

Sorry, Office Manager (id=15258) doesn't have 'read' access to:
- Project (project.project)

If you really, really need access, perhaps you can win over your friendly administrator with a batch of freshly baked cookies.

This seems to be a multi-company issue, but you do not have access to the proper company to access the record anyhow.

Fault The operation cannot be completed: Missing required value for the field 'Currency' (currency_id).
Model: 'Journal Item' (account.move.line)
- create/update: a mandatory field is not set
- delete: another model requires the record being deleted, you can archive it instead
